AppDescription.message: Inaondoa miline myeusi kwenye video katika skrini za ultrawide (21:9, 32:9, n.k.) popote, ikijumuisha YouTube, Netflix, Prime Video, n.k.

ChangeKeyboardShortcuts.message: Badilisha njia za haraka za kibodi

ImproveUs.message: Tafadhali tuambie jinsi ya kuboresha kupitia barua pepe

Off.description: Name of the mode when the extension is disabled and doesn't apply any transformations

PrivacyPolicyText.message: Tunaheshimu faragha yako na tunaadhimisha EU GDPR. Tafadhali pitia na ukubali sera yetu ya faragha ili uanze kutumia UltraWide Video.

ReviewUs.message: Tafadhali acha ukaguzi wa UltraWide Video kwenye Chrome Web Store

Stretch.description: Name of the mode when video on the webpage gets stretched horizontally to fill the video element and remove black bars

Zoom.description: Name of the mode when video on the webpage gets zoomed (scaled up, vertically and horizontally) to fill the video element and remove black bars
